days.label: Monday
days.title: Upper Body
days.theme: Build strong shoulders, chest, back, and arms with stable equipment.
warmup: Arm circles and shoulder blade squeezes

exercises.name: Plate-Loaded Chest Press
tips: Stop one or two reps before failure.
exercises.matt: Smooth, controlled reps beat heavy weight. Own the movement.

exercises.name: Chest-Supported Row
exercises.matt: Back work helps posture and shoulder health. Keep it clean.

exercises.name: Lat Pulldown
exercises.matt: Think elbows to pockets.

exercises.name: Machine Shoulder Press
exercises.matt: This is support work, not a max effort event.

exercises.name: Machine Biceps Curl
exercises.matt: Good reps count. Momentum does not.

exercises.name: Rope Triceps Pressdown
exercises.matt: Lock in the elbows and move with purpose.

days.label: Tuesday
days.title: Lower Body, Knee-Friendly
days.theme: Build leg strength while respecting the knee and avoiding risky balance challenges.
cooldown: Gentle quad, hamstring, and calf stretch

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.matt: Pain-free range wins. No need to prove anything to the machine.

exercises.name: Seated Leg Curl
exercises.matt: Strong hamstrings help protect the knee.

exercises.name: Leg Extension
exercises.matt: This is blood flow and control, not a heavy lift.

exercises.name: Machine Hip Thrust or Glute Bridge
exercises.matt: Glutes support the whole lower body chain.

exercises.name: Seated Calf Raise
exercises.matt: Slow reps, no bouncing.

days.label: Thursday
days.title: Full Body
warmup: Treadmill walk or Concept2 row 5-8 minutes

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.matt: Keep it strong and safe.

exercises.name: Machine Chest Press
exercises.matt: Steady pressure, steady breathing.

exercises.name: Machine Row
exercises.matt: Rows are money for posture.

exercises.name: Lat Pulldown
exercises.matt: Elbows down, not hands down.

exercises.name: Machine Lateral Raise
exercises.matt: Small muscles need clean reps.

days.label: Friday
days.title: Accessory & Finisher
days.theme: Extra chest, back, arms, calves, and stable accessory work.
cooldown: Gentle pec, lat, and forearm stretch

exercises.name: Incline Plate-Loaded Chest Press
tips: Seat adjusted so handles track upper chest.
exercises.matt: Good chest volume without making it a max effort day.

exercises.name: Single-Arm Dumbbell Row, Lawnmower Start
exercises.matt: Support yourself and row with control.

exercises.name: Machine Lateral Raise
exercises.matt: Shoulders respond to quality.

exercises.name: Machine or Cable Biceps Curl
exercises.matt: Finish strong, keep it clean.

exercises.name: Rope Triceps Pressdown
exercises.matt: Controlled lockout.

exercises.name: Standing Calf Raise Machine
exercises.matt: One calf movement is enough. Make it count.
